description_long: This is a mid-rise, rectangular brick building with a flat concrete roof, typical of older urban commercial structures. The facade features rows of small, square windows with blue-green frames, and several metal balconies or fire escapes on one side. The roof is equipped with industrial elements such as large pipes, a rooftop access structure, and a vent, suggesting utility and storage functions. The exterior brickwork is weathered, with some discoloration and patches, adding to its industrial character. A large, blank signboard is mounted on one side, while another side displays a series of windows and balconies, likely indicating the main entrance and customer-facing side. The building's overall appearance is utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on function over form.
description: A weathered, brick commercial building with blue-green window frames, metal balconies, and a flat, industrial-style roof featuring pipes and a rooftop access structure.
description_view_0: This side shows a large blank signboard on the brick wall and a partial view of blue-green window frames and balconies on the left edge.
description_view_1: The facade features multiple rows of square windows, a central metal vent, and the rooftop access structure with visible pipes on the roof.
description_view_2: This view highlights the plain brick wall with vertical concrete supports and the rooftop structures, with balconies visible on the right edge.
description_view_3: The main entrance side, with several blue-green balconies, rows of windows, and a protruding sign structure on the right, as well as rooftop pipes and access.
attribute_storefront_signage: A large, blank rectangular signboard is mounted on one side of the building; no text or logos are visible.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront exterior features rows of square windows, several metal balconies, a large blank signboard, and a protruding sign structure. Entrances are implied but not clearly visible; the design is functional with minimal decorative elements.
